info.name: Hermes Agent API
info.description: Complete API collection for testing the Hermes Agent API server. Run on http://localhost:8642 with API key auth.

item.name: Auth
item.description: JWT token management: obtain, refresh, and revoke access tokens. Use these to manage session-based authentication.

request.description: Request a JWT access token by providing credentials. The returned token can be used for subsequent authenticated requests.
Refresh an expired JWT access token using a valid refresh token.
Revoke the current JWT token, invalidating it for future use.

item.name: WebSocket
item.description: WebSocket endpoint for real-time agent communication and streaming responses.

request.description: Establish a WebSocket connection to the agent for real-time streaming, events, and interactive sessions. Connect via token query parameter.

item.name: Sessions
item.description: Manage conversation sessions: list, search, retrieve, update, delete, and export session data.

request.description: Retrieve a list of all conversation sessions with metadata.
Search sessions by query string to find relevant conversations.
Retrieve full details of a specific session by its ID.
Update session metadata, name, or other mutable properties.
Delete a session and all its associated conversation data.
Export session data in a portable format (e.g., JSON or markdown).

item.name: Config
item.description: View and modify server configuration settings at runtime.

request.description: Retrieve the current server configuration.
Update server configuration values at runtime.

item.name: Memory
item.description: Manage the agent's memory system: retrieve memory store, add entries, query, and delete memory.

request.description: Retrieve the full memory store contents or summary.
Modify the memory store (e.g., clear, compact, or filter entries).
Delete the entire memory store or specific entries based on filters.
Retrieve a specific memory entry (may require query parameters to identify the entry).
Add a new entry to the memory store with key, value, and optional metadata.

item.name: Skills
item.description: Manage agent skills: list, create, update, delete, check, and update skills.

request.description: Retrieve a list of all available agent skills.
Retrieve detailed information about a specific skill.
Create a new skill with configuration for the agent.
Delete a skill from the agent.
Check if a skill is enabled and properly configured.
Update a skill's configuration or status.

item.name: Cron Jobs
item.description: Manage scheduled jobs: list, create, update, delete, pause, resume, and manual execution.

request.description: List all scheduled/cron jobs configured on the agent.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "daily-report",
  "schedule": "0 9 * * *",
  "prompt": "Generate a daily summary report of all activity.",
  "enabled": true,
  "timeout": 300
}

request.description: Create a new scheduled/cron job for the agent.
Retrieve details of a specific scheduled job.
Update a scheduled job's schedule, prompt, or enabled status.
Delete a scheduled job.
Temporarily pause a scheduled job without deleting it.
Resume a previously paused job.
Manually trigger a job execution outside of its schedule.

item.name: Cron History
item.description: View job execution history and output logs for scheduled jobs.

request.description: Retrieve output across all jobs, optionally filtered by query parameters.
Retrieve the execution history for a specific job.

item.name: Get Job Output by Run ID

request.description: Retrieve the output of a specific job execution by its run ID.

item.name: Gateway & Platforms
item.description: Manage the AI gateway: check status, list/add/update/remove platforms, and connect/disconnect platforms.

request.description: Check the current status of the AI gateway.
List all registered AI platforms in the gateway.
Register a new AI platform with the gateway.
Update configuration for one or more platforms.
Remove one or more platform registrations.
Connect to a specific platform by name (e.g., openai, anthropic).
Disconnect from a specific platform by name.

item.name: Tools & MCP
item.description: Manage agent tools, toolsets, and MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers.

request.description: List all available tools for the agent.
Update the agent's tool configuration (enable/disable specific tools).
List all available toolsets (groups of related tools).
List all registered MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers.
Register a new MCP server with the agent.
Update configuration for an existing MCP server.
Remove a registered MCP server.
Reload a specific MCP server (e.g., after config changes).

item.name: OpenAI Compatibility
item.description: OpenAI-compatible API endpoints for drop-in replacement with OpenAI clients and tools.

request.description: OpenAI-compatible chat completions endpoint. Send messages and receive AI-generated responses. Supports streaming.

exec: pm.test("Response has choices or content", function () {

request.description: List all responses from the OpenAI-compatible API.
Create a new response using the OpenAI Responses API format.
Retrieve a specific response by its ID.
Delete a specific response by its ID.
List available models via the OpenAI-compatible API.
Check server health via the OpenAI-compatible health endpoint.

item.name: System
item.description: System-level endpoints for health checks and basic server info.

request.description: Basic health check endpoint (no authentication required). Returns server status.
